reasoning: The control AC-4(4) focuses on ensuring encrypted information flow, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through enforcing TLS for ingress traffic, ensuring mTLS in service meshes, and securing API server communications. NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce encrypted traffic within the cluster, while Ingress controllers and Service Mesh configurations ensure encrypted traffic at the boundaries.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | flow control of encrypted information prevent enc
